name: time-before-after-inverse-declared
query: PREFIX time: <http://www.w3.org/2006/time#> ASK WHERE { time:before <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#inverseOf> time:after }

name: time-before-transitive-declared
query: PREFIX time: <http://www.w3.org/2006/time#> ASK WHERE { time:before a <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#TransitiveProperty> }
